fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 57. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 54.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Abundant options in Knysna including B&Bs, self-catering apartments, lodges near lagoon and forest; book early for Oyster Festival period.

final_verdict.one_liner: Stunning Garden Route road race blending coastal forests, climbs, and festival vibes.

youtube_data.search_query: Knysna Cycle Tour gran fondo cycling Knysna

videos.title: ONE INCREDIBLE BIKE RIDE.
videos.description:
We take on 130km of cycling on gravel, through a desert and a rain-forest all the way to the coastal town of Knysna. South Africa is an incredible place to ride, this is up there on the top 10 rides ever!

https://twitter.com/francis_cade
https://www.instagram.com/francisccade
https://www.facebook.com/franccade

Donate to The PaceCentre, a school for children with motor disorders: https://www.justgiving.com/fundraising/107for107

Music by: https://soundcloud.com/imcameronbutler

I started filming stuff in April 2016. Now we're travelling the world and filming it, I'd forget what I've done otherwise.

videos.curation_reason: First-person ride experience through the Knysna region covering 130km of gravel with excellent production quality and detailed course commentary.

videos.title: Epic Motorbike Adventure: Conquering Prince Alfred's Pass and Exploring Knysna's Hidden Gems!
videos.description:
Join me on an exhilarating motorbike adventure as I journey from George to Uniondale! 🌍 From the stunning Uniondale Poort to Avontuur, and up the epic 88km Prince Alfred's Pass, every moment was filled with breathtaking views and unforgettable experiences. 🌄

Discover the hidden gem of De Vlugt, marvel at a unique trumpet statue, and meet fellow adventurers on scooters. Ascend to the skies at Spitzkop, the highest vehicle-accessible point in the Knysna area, where it feels like you can touch the heavens. 

Ride through the lush indigenous forest via Kom se Pad or Gouda Pass, and stand in awe of a magnificent big tree. While I decided to save the Seven Passes Road for another day, this journey was nothing short of spectacular. 

Please subscribe to see more adventures.

A huge thank you to Mauritz for the dreamlike backtrack music. Check out his channel: Beautiful Melodies Spa Music 🎶

#MotorbikeAdventure #PrinceAlfredsPass #UniondalePoort #Knysna #Spitzkop #KomSePad #GoudaPass #TravelVlog #MotorbikeJourney #AdventureAwaits #gravelandtar #tourism #SouthAfrica

videos.title: FULGAZ - Knysna to Phantom Pass (Easy!)
videos.description:
Powered by Restream https://restream.io/

19,69 km / 247 m Elevation

quotes.text: We start in kind of semi-arid desert like conditions and as we get closer to the coast we actually climb over a mountain range and then the vegetation changes remarkably and then suddenly we're in the bottom end of the garden route when we come into Knysna.
We are well and truly in the middle of nowhere, haven't seen a car for the last hour, it's pretty hot it's pretty windy, we're kind of crawling up this hill - sitting 100 kilometres truly on our own.

key_challenges.name: Prince Alfred Pass
key_challenges.description: 88 km long mountain pass that is the longest mountain pass in South Africa, goes through four different biomes with dense forest sections

key_challenges.name: Mountain Range Crossing
key_challenges.description: Riders face strong headwinds described as definitely faster than 15k per hour, making progress slow on climbs

terrain_notes.text: Route starts in semi-arid desert conditions and vegetation changes dramatically as you get closer to the coast and climb over mountain ranges
After Union Dale the tar road becomes dirt road with gravel sections throughout the route
Some sections have been specially tarred while others remain gravel, with dramatic vegetation changes through different biomes

gear_mentions.text: Road tube works in a cyclocross tire for repairs

race_day_tips.text: Bring multiple spare tubes - riders experienced punctures every two hours
Be prepared for very remote sections - no cars seen for 90 minutes and no neutral service available
Expect cold conditions early in the morning, especially at higher elevations

additional_quotes.text: Penn 360 degrees I think 100 kilometres truly on our own
I was up early like a kid I was awake at 5 o'clock

rider_intel.search_text: The Knysna area offers challenging gravel riding through diverse terrain and remote conditions. Riders describe starting in semi-arid desert conditions before climbing over mountain ranges where vegetation changes dramatically toward the coast. The famous Prince Alfred Pass spans 88 kilometers through four different biomes with dense forest sections, making it the longest mountain pass in South Africa. Expect strong headwinds exceeding 15 km/hour that slow progress on climbs. The route alternates between tar and dirt road sections with significant gravel portions. Riders face very remote conditions with no cars seen for 90+ minutes and no neutral service support. Mechanical issues are common with punctures occurring every two hours. Early morning temperatures are cold, especially at higher elevations. The terrain includes dramatic rock formations and scenic mountain passes. This area was historically used for Cape Epic stages, indicating serious technical and physical challenges for gravel cyclists.
